what_it_does: This file is a living noticeboard guide that records the current status of two FACE-1 breadth surfaces: a global timeline surface and an address surface. It reports that timeline data has been verified, its rendering is blocked on missing DNA adapter/archetype support, and the address surface has no clean route and is not started. It also documents the handoff to continuing-DNA and the decision not to pre-build a stranded store-half.
observations: The item is type 'guide', state 'living', authored by 'projection', with identical created/updated timestamps.
It declares timeline data verified through /api/events (global newest-first feed) and /api/timeline (per-session, requires ?session=).
Rendering the timeline is blocked because DNA has no timelineRecord adapter and no 'timeline' archetype in face-adapters.js + layouts.json.
The author handed the live /api/events route shape to continuing-DNA via thread g-1782120769 and is waiting for DNA to ship before clone-hosting the surface.
The address surface is explicitly marked as not started, with no clean route identified.
It references related work via board://item-78c63045 and source commits f732747, 5c709de plus doc TIMELINE-ROW-SHAPE.md.
standouts: Timeline data is verified but rendering is deliberately blocked on DNA rather than building a stranded UI half.
Direct coordination with continuing-DNA uses the live /api/events shape as the design input.
The file is honest that neither surface exists yet; only the timeline data half is verified.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, address, type, state, title, author_session, channel, thread, links, created/updated, and history.
Uses board:// URI as the item address and a references link to another board item.
Title follows the 'HARVEST · projection · ...' naming convention.
Body uses structured sections: STATUS, LANE, ABOUT, KIND, SUMMARY, CLAIMS/DECISIONS, RELATIONS, OPEN_QUESTIONS/GAPS, SOURCE_ADDRESS.
References external artifacts by commit hash, thread id, and document name.
concerns: The entire timeline render plan depends on an external DNA deliverable with no fallback or interim path documented.
The address surface is unscoped beyond 'no clean route yet' and has no next step except waiting.
Claims about DNA internals (face-adapters.js + layouts.json scan) are asserted but not reproduced in the file.
Created and updated timestamps are identical even though the item is marked 'living'.
notes: A projection harvest note saying timeline data is ready but rendering is gated on DNA, while the address surface remains unstarted and unscoped.
questions: What is the exact contract of a DNA 'timelineRecord' adapter and a 'timeline' archetype?
What does 'clone-host the whole surface in one beat (store+overlay+nav+verify)' mean operationally?
What is the FACE-1 breadth-surface program and how do channels/board/transcript relate?
What is the content of TIMELINE-ROW-SHAPE.md and thread g-1782120769?
How does /api/timeline differ from /api/events in schema and intended use?
What would a clean route for the address surface look like?
What does 'address system surfaced' mean in this context?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to document blocked work plus a handoff for timeline and address surfaces; the content matches, with added emphasis on avoiding a stranded store-half and honestly listing gaps.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to make the blocked timeline actionable for DNA by supplying the real API shape and precise ask, while resisting the temptation to build a UI that cannot yet be wired; it also wants to keep the address surface honestly unstarted rather than fabricate progress.
novelty: The deliberate refusal to pre-build a 'stranded store-half' and the use of a live production route shape as the direct input for an upstream adapter design.
contribution: It contributes a time-stamped, factual record of verified timeline data, the exact blocker in DNA, the handoff context, and the honest unstarted state of the address surface, which a fused system can use to resume work once DNA ships the required adapter/archetype.
summary_for_embedding: A living noticeboard guide documenting that FACE-1 timeline data is verified via /api/events but rendering is blocked on a missing DNA timelineRecord adapter and 'timeline' archetype, while the address surface has no clean route and is not started.
intention_for_embedding: To record the current blocked state, hand off the precise live API shape to continuing-DNA, and avoid building a stranded timeline UI until the DNA dependency is resolved.
